reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle for the static spike sprite and attach a fixed collider strip.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_spike_cluster_static_48x16.png through AssetServer before section spawn.
runtime_notes: Collider width follows the 48x16 logical size from specs.dimensions_px.
Spike entities remain static and never rotate.
Hazard tint stays neutral so the damage flash on the player remains distinct.

context.usage: Ground hazard cluster used in moss corridors and tight drop lanes where the player must manage descent speed precisely.

shape.silhouette: Three sharp iron spikes mounted on a dark base plate with narrow highlights at each tip.

specs.material: Cold iron spikes on a dark stone mount.

acceptance_criteria: Each spike tip reaches within 2 px of the top edge, preserving hazard readability.
Base plate remains thicker than 3 px so the cluster stays legible on dark floors.
